production.notes: v2.0.5 ai-python patch chain: (v2.0.1) weekly training.yml + compare_challenger.py + prep-training-ec2 + 4w holdout gate, (v2.0.2) reuse LIVE_SSH_KEY + SUBMODULE_PAT existing secrets + extended training window (start-date shifts back so holdout is +4w not -4w), (v2.0.3) Health RPC HEALTHY+bundle.version in policy mode, (v2.0.4) AWS CLI v2 via official installer on training EC2 (Ubuntu 24.04 dropped awscli apt package), (v2.0.5) force_promote workflow_dispatch input on training.yml for one-off bootstrap / emergency manual deploys where the held-out relative gate is misleading (e.g. challenger == champion bitwise). bot-node v2.0.0 runtime unchanged — inference contract stable across v2.0.x ai-python patches.

compatibility_rules.shared-proto: All services MUST match the same proto major version
compatibility_rules.ai-python: inference and training MUST be from the same repo release tag
compatibility_rules.policy-bundle: PolicyBundle version is orthogonal to image versions — the active bundle is pinned at s3://crypto-bot-models-eu-north-1/policies/<name>/current and hot-swapped via deploy-model.yml
compatibility_rules.v2.x-lockstep: bot-node v2.x and ai-python v2.x MUST deploy together — the candle payload size and the policy contract change in lock-step, a v1.x ai-inference will not understand a v2.x bot-node payload
